title: Add offline demo runner
goal: Add `jcode-harness demo run <id|all>` so issue #2 demos can execute deterministic non-writing offline demos while blocking project-writing demos unless explicitly allowed.
completionConditions: `demo run mock-provider-run-json --json` executes successfully and emits parseable JSON report
`demo run release-gate-smoke --json` is blocked without `--allow-writes` and exits non-zero after JSON report
`demo run all --json` executes non-writing demos and marks writing demos blocked with status warn
Docs/status/release gates document `demo run` JSON contract and checks
Focused e2e, cargo check, selfdev jcode, and selfdev jcode-harness validations pass
verificationCommands: cargo run -q -p jcode --bin jcode-harness -- demo run mock-provider-run-json --json | python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null
cargo run -q -p jcode --bin jcode-harness -- demo run all --json
notes: Runner executes the current binary recursively with manifest argv minus argv[0]. It captures stdout/stderr and blocks project_writes demos by default.
